name: unicity-aos
description: Connect Claude Code to Unicity AOS as a principal-scoped agent with capsule tools over MCP, a readiness doctor, an AOS HUD, and /unicity-aos:* operator commands.

principal.title: AOS principal
principal.description: The Unicity AOS principal this Claude Code session acts as. It scopes tool execution, capability checks, and audit to this identity. Defaults to 'claude-code', a least-authority agent in the Claude family. Provision principals explicitly with the AOS oracle installer. Run `aos agent list` to inspect them.
